text.title: Template Task Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the template-task methodology end-to-end.

step.name: load-plan-row
step.action: Locate the wave/row matching the target task id; extract objective, file list, FR/AD traces, dependency list.
step.decision-gate: If plan row missing or feature still in draft, emit skip-record and STOP.

step.name: render-header
step.action: Fill SDD References, Task Dependency Tree, Requirements Coverage (FR-X / AD-X verbatim from spec/design).

step.name: compose-ac
step.action: For each FR cited, author ≥1 Given-When-Then AC where Then is a code-verifiable outcome.
step.output: Task draft with Acceptance Criteria filled.
step.decision-gate: If any AC lacks a verifiable Then, reject and rewrite.

step.name: enumerate-files
step.action: For each file: CREATE / MODIFY / DELETE + scope sentence. Note implicit deps via shared-file analysis (cross-reference other tasks).

step.name: estimate-and-finalize
step.action: Sum est_tokens (SDD load + dep tree + research + implementation + tests); if >100k, mark "needs-split". Verify Implementation + Summary sections are empty. Validate against schema.
step.decision-gate: If >100k tokens or Implementation/Summary pre-filled, BLOCK dispatch.
